---
title: "week2"
format: 
      html:
          theme: cerulean
      pdf:
        toc: true
editor: visual
author: "Vibhor Dabas"
---

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
library(rmarkdown)
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)
```

# Introduction
